label: Kagi
description: Query Kagi's premium ad-free search engine via its paid API.

form.title: Connect Kagi
form.subtitle: Paste your Kagi API key to enable ad-free web search from Anton.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste your Kagi API key. Get one from kagi.com → Settings → API — takes about 30 seconds.
methods.how_to:
## Connect with a Kagi API key

Kagi's API requires a paid Kagi account (Ultimate or API plan) with billing enabled.

### Steps

1. Log in at [kagi.com](https://kagi.com).
2. Click your avatar or initials in the top-right corner → **Settings**.
3. In the left sidebar, click **API**.
4. If you haven't enabled API access yet, click **Generate API Key** (you may need to add a billing method first).
5. Copy the key shown on the page.
6. Paste it into the **API Key** field below and click **Submit**.

### Notes

- The API key is tied to your Kagi account's credit balance. Monitor usage in the same **Settings → API** page.
- If you regenerate the key, you'll need to update it here — the old key stops working immediately.
- Kagi charges per search query; check current pricing at [kagi.com/pricing](https://kagi.com/pricing).

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: From kagi.com → Settings → API. Treated as a secret and never logged.
